subject: [PATCH v1 07/17] fuse: prepare to setup backing inode passthrough on lookup

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds a helper function to associate a backing inode for inode passthrough operations in the FUSE file system. The helper, fuse_backing_id_get, retrieves a fuse backing object by its ID and increments its reference count to store it in the fuse inode. This is part of setting up backing inode passthrough on lookup response. The minimal requirement for the backing inode is to support GETATTR passthrough operations. Unlike open operations, this mapping is created for the entire lifetime of the inode and cannot be changed later.
